data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks means that the requirement cannot be assessed, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.
